title: lepisorus buergerianus
intro: Lepisorus buergerianus, also known as the Buerger's fern or Buerger's lepiota, is a type of plant belonging to the family Aspleniaceae, commonly found in East Asia. Lepisorus buergerianus has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Lepisorus buergerianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other holistic practices.
